sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3234" key="a)/klwstos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄκλωστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κλώθω</etym>) <sense id="n3234.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unspun</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">στήμονες</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:221" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">221</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
